entity.summary: Kazakhstan-headquartered centralized digital-asset exchange founded in 2017 and offering trading, staking, and portfolio services.
entity.notes: BitexLive's official ecosystem profile states that the exchange was founded in 2017 and is headquartered in Uralsk, Kazakhstan. The exact launch day is not stated, so HEI uses a year-level date placeholder.

events.title: BitexLive exchange founded
events.description: BitexLive was founded in Kazakhstan in 2017 as a centralized digital-asset exchange.
events.notes: The official ecosystem profile establishes the year but not the exact day, so January 1 is used as a year-level date placeholder.

evidence.title: Bitexlive official website
evidence.notes: Official domain verifies the current BitexLive identity and active exchange interface.

evidence.notes: Independent exchange directory reference corroborates the BitexLive identity.
